title: Block 80% of traffic with Workers
meta_description: Cut origin load 79% with Cloudflare Workers caching — Durable Objects for rate limiting, KV for storage, and real results from a 6-week run in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn CPU on every API call.

Cloudflare Workers can block 80 % of traffic before it hits the origin — for pennies.

https://kubaik.github.io/block-80-of-traffic-with-workers
